title: Ghost-ALICE OS Skill Catalog
description: Ghost-ALICE OS skill catalog schema. The SSOT is each skill directory's SKILL.md frontmatter. The catalog is generated by build_catalog.py and should not be edited by hand.

version.description: Catalog schema version in semver format. Increase the major version for breaking compatibility changes.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp for the build_catalog.py run.

source_root.description: Skill directory scan root, relative to the repository root.

install_roots.description: Top-level skill roots discovered by build_catalog.py and synchronized with installer install targets.

skills.description: All discovered skill entries sorted alphabetically by name.

name.description: Skill identifier. Must match the SKILL.md frontmatter name and directory name.

path.description: SKILL.md path relative to the repository root.

description.description: Original description from skill frontmatter, including trigger keywords.

compatibility.description: Environment or skill dependencies as free-text entries. Omit when absent.

allowed_tools.description: Original Claude Code allowed-tools frontmatter field. Omit when absent.

family.description: Skill family, such as coding-convention, domain, or system. Inferred from directory structure and the system skill list.

governance_class.description: Governance involvement taxonomy for the skill. This does not replace family; it expresses how much domain, verification, and lifecycle skills participate in governance judgment as a separate axis.

meta.description: Whether this is a meta entrypoint. When true, the skill dispatches other skills. Currently applies only to using-coding-convention.

calls_relation.description: Static handoff/flow relationships declared by SKILL.md frontmatter calls. calls means possible agent-side flow or handoff, not runtime dependency, consumer-read relationship, or dynamic loop.

target.description: Called skill name. For type=meta, target may be '*' to mean all catalog skills. For non-meta internal calls, target must refer to another catalog entry; use external_target for skills outside the catalog.

external_target.description: Dependency outside this catalog, such as Anthropic-provided docx or pdf skills. Use either target or external_target, not both.

type.description: Call relationship type. type=meta may use target='*' as a catalog wildcard.

union_group.description: Used only when type=union. Entries in the same union_group form an OR relationship selected by the user.

source_line.description: Body citation location as a SKILL.md line number. Forensic field for verifiability.

note.description: Relationship note, body citation, or current policy document reference.
